form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Mix 3/4 on April 13 over 515m at Sandown behind Silver Mack beaten 4.5 lengths (30.02). Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.57) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 6 lengths. Has one success and five minors from nine starts from box 2. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 11 over 525m at this track behind Lamia Nonna Mim beaten 1.75 lengths (30.27) in a Grade 5. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 525m at this track. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 525m in 30.34. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 350m at Healesville at Free For All level. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and scored again last start over 515m at Sandown (29.64,) beating Baby Girl Pearl. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Shepparton to win by 4.5 lengths in 21.82, beating Starship Atlas. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 525m at this track behind Lamia Nonna Mim beaten 11 lengths (30.92). Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 410m at Horsham. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.
